text_block_list.name: School Store Employee
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure about this?! You're<n>really willing to
try... the cursed ice<n>cream?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, so this notorious new flavor<n>is... grilled
mutton, eh?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
They say the moment you taste it, the<n>stench and
saltiness spread<n>throughout your whole mouth!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: But it's not the taste you wannawatch out for.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Everyone who gives in to their<n>curiosity and tries
this stuff ends<n>up—for whatever reason—suffering
some sort of mysterious misfortune<n>that very
same day!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Making basic mistakes on quizzes,<n>forgetting their
shoes...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Didn't one person even get her tail<n>burnt in a
hairdryer accident?

text_block_list.name: School Store Employee
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, she did. Which is why the ice<n>cream's
rumored to be cursed. I<n>haven't been able to sell a
single<n>cone since then.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Please lay your worries to rest. I'll be<n>the one to
break the curse!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Once people know this ice cream is<n>safe, I'm sure
they'll be jumping at<n>the chance to buy it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hmm? Whaddya think you'relooking at?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I've got it. After hearing our plight,<n>your daring
heart is beating for a<n>challenge, is it?!

text_block_list.name: School Store Employee
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're going to try it too?! Thank<n>you so much!

Before I even have a chance to<n>process what's
happening, the<n>employee brings each of us an ice
cream.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now that's an... interesting color.<n>What wouldja
call it? Mulberry?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: This feels... deeply unnerving.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You sure about this, Satono? My<n>gut's telling me
we're teetering on a<n>knife's edge here.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You can always take a step back to<n>where it's
safe.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: No! I can't back down now!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You can never truly know the<n>outcome of an action
until you take it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Action is what guides us to outcomes!<n>And intent
determines our actions!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Hahaha! That's what I'm<n>talkin' about! I
like your pluck!

Realizing that I've missed my chance<n>to jump off
this sinking ship, I steel<n>myself and join Satono
Diamond and<n>the others in eating the ice cream.

Just as the rumors said, the truly<n>indescribable
flavor spreads<n>throughout my mouth...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Th-there! All finished! Now I suppose<n>we must
wait and see if anything bad<n>happens...
choice_data_list: Maybe we ought to stay put...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Waiting for the curse to come to us,<n>huh? Heh...
That sounds pretty fun,<n>actually.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well then, everyone! Let's hold on<n>tight and wait it
out!

text_block_list.name: Sketchy Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, finally made it in! Now, which<n>student should
I interview first?<n>Gonna hit 'em with all my super
hard-hitting questions!

text_block_list.name: Sketchy Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Looks like I've found the perfect<n>targets.
Excuse meee...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Ha ha ha! So you've shown yourself!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Y'know, I was gettin' real tired ofwaiting around!

text_block_list.name: Sketchy Reporter
text_block_list.text: Gyah! S-somebody help me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hm? Who was that just now?

And so, we successfully break the<n>curse without
encountering any<n>disasters.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Egads! You mean we should go on<n>the offensive?
Sounds splendid!<n>Onward, comrades!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So we're all going to march around<n>until
something happens, then?<n>Challenge accepted!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, let's march like we mean it!<n>Last one to
France is a rotten egg!
choice_data_list: Uh, let's stay on academy grounds!

text_block_list.text:
And so I set off strutting around the<n>school with
Satono Diamond and the<n>others...

As we march on fearlessly, no<n>misfortune befalls
us!
Word of our bravery spreads, and...

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Can I get that cursed<n>flavor? Ah! Me
too!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Looks like things are really<n>picking up now!
♪

With the stigma gone, the ice cream's<n>distinct and
somewhat addictive taste<n>helps it to sell quickly.
However...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: What?! It still hasn't sold out?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
How could this be? We dispelled the<n>curse rumors
and everything!
choice_data_list: I mean... it's still grilled mutton flavor.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Ahhh.
